info.title: licenses
info.description: .NET tool to report licenses in a project or solution.

commands.name: report
commands.description: Collect and report all licenses used in a project or solution.

arguments.name: project
arguments.description: The project or solution to report licenses from.

commands.name: templates
commands.description: Allows to list and export templates.

commands.name: export
commands.description: Export the specified template to file in order to customize it.

arguments.name: TEMPLATE_NAME
arguments.description: The name of the template to export.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists templates containing the specified template name. If no name is specified, lists all templates.

arguments.name: TEMPLATE_NAME
arguments.description: If specified, only the templates matching the name will be shown.
